stemHtml: A pilot wants to know when anti-collision lights must be switched on. Where is this specified?

options.a: ICAO Annex 2 and the Standardised European Rules of the Air (SERA).
options.b: ICAO Annex 14 and the European regulation on aerodrome requirements.
options.d: ICAO Annex 2 and the European regulation on aerodrome requirements.
